_comment: NPC: Situ Nan (司徒南). Canon ID: N20. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Situ Nan
personality: boisterous, loyal friend; first true ally

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Sworn brother of Wang Lin; Heaven Trampling potential
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Situ Nan; Yang Solid Peak reconstructed; Heaven Trampling potential

note: Wang Lin's first true friend and sworn brother; Divine Emperor

personality_traits._comment: NOVEL_STATEMENT: Divine Emperor, playful exterior but ancient power. Low caution (nearly invincible), high curiosity, moderate ambition. Not ruthless but not soft. High face — emperor pride.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Ha! Another cultivator! You look like you can fight. Good. I like people who can fight. Come, sit. Tell me your name. I will tell you whether it is a good name for surviving.
I have lived longer than this sect. I have died and come back. Death is overrated. What matters is having a good friend to pull you back. Wang Lin is mine.
The Vermilion Bird Divine Sect thinks it owns me. The Heavenly Fate Sect thinks it can predict me. The Soul Refining Sect thinks it can capture me. They are all wrong. I am Situ Nan.
Spirit stones and jade slips. If you have them, I will share stories of battles that shook the planet. If you do not, I will share them anyway. I am generous like that.

daily_schedule.action: Meal and boast about past battles

sect_tasks.name: Battle Knowledge Exchange
sect_tasks.description: Situ Nan trades battle experience for spirit stones and jade slips. His knowledge spans millennia.

sect_tasks.name: Combat Training Request
sect_tasks.description: Situ Nan offers combat guidance in exchange for emeralds and experience. His training is legendary.

desires.what: Share a story about a past battle with anyone nearby
desires.why: I have lived for thousands of years and fought battles that shook planets. Someone should hear about them. Besides, it is entertaining.
desires.source: NOVEL_STATEMENT: Situ Nan's personality is boisterous, he loves sharing battle stories. Initiation line: 'I will share stories of battles that shook the planet.'
desires.line: Ha! Let me tell you about the time I fought three Soul Transformation cultivators at once. Three! They thought they had me cornered in the Valley of Lost Souls. They were wrong. They were very, very wrong.

desires.what: Challenge a nearby cultivator to a friendly spar
desires.why: A cultivator who does not fight rusts. I want to see what the younger generation can do.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI. Situ Nan is a combat-oriented Divine Emperor. Initiation line: 'You look like you can fight. Good. I like people who can fight.'
desires.line: You there! Yes, you. Come, show me what you can do. Do not worry — I will not kill you. Probably. Ha! I jest. Mostly.

desires.what: Offer to share battle experience with a cultivator who showed skill
desires.why: A good fight deserves respect. If someone shows skill, I share what I know. It costs me nothing and might keep them alive.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI. Situ Nan's sect_task 'battle_stories' trades battle knowledge. A Divine Emperor would naturally share experience with those who interest him.
desires.line: Not bad. Not bad at all. You remind me of a cultivator I knew two thousand years ago. Same fire in the eyes. If you want, I can tell you what I told him. It might keep you alive longer.
